    Assertion

    Validates that a condition is false.
    Assertion
    Assertion.isNotBlank(String str)
    Validates that a string is not blank.
    Assertion
    Assertion.isNotBlank(String str, String msg, Object... params)
    Validates that a string is not blank with custom message.
    Assertion
    Assertion.isNotNull(Object o)
    Validates that an object is not null.
    Assertion
    Assertion.isNotNull(Object o, String msg, Object... params)
    Validates that an object is not null with custom message.
    Assertion
    Assertion.isNull(Object o)
    Validates that an object is null.
    Assertion
    Assertion.isNull(Object o, String msg, Object... params)
    Validates that an object is null with custom message.
    Assertion
    Assertion.isTrue(boolean test, String msg, Object... params)
    Validates that a condition is true.
    Assertion
    Assertion.isValid(Supplier<Assertion> assertionSupplier)
    Validates a supplied assertion.
    Assertion
    Assertion.when(boolean condition, Supplier<Assertion> assertionSupplier)
    Evaluates an assertion when a condition is met.
